document_meta.document_title: Installation Instructions for use by heating contractor

source_refs.source_quote: The maximum room temperature of the mechanical room where the boiler is located must not exceed 104°F (40°C).

technical_specs.parameter: Horizontal vent-air intake termination wall thickness (Minimum)
Horizontal vent-air intake termination wall thickness (Maximum)

source_refs.source_quote: Venting clearance to combustibles (Stainless Steel / Polypropylene) As per vent manufacturer's requirements.

technical_specs.value: Sealed unvented heating systems for heating water

source_refs.source_quote: The boiler is only intended to be installed and operated in sealed unvented heating systems with due attention paid to the associated installation, service and operating instructions. The boiler is only designed for the heating of heating water.
Site the boiler on a load bearing foundation with a minimum height of 4 in. (100 mm).

technical_specs.value: Free of flammable, explosive gases and vapors

source_refs.source_quote: Combustion air must be free of flammable, explosive gases and vapors.

technical_specs.parameter: Combustion air dust content (daily mean value)

source_refs.source_quote: Dust-free, daily mean value < 0.15 ppm (< 150 µg/m3) air,

technical_specs.value: Not contaminated with halogens or other solvent vapors

source_refs.source_quote: Combustion air must not be contaminated with halogens or other solvent vapors. In swimming pools in particular, pay special attention to chlorine and salts from water treatment.
*1 in multiboiler installations, clearance between boilers can be reduced to 0" (0 mm)
The ramp length Ⓐ is 50 in. (1270 mm) for CI2 models 399 through 1000
and 75 in. (1900 mm) for CI2 models 1500 and 2000.

technical_specs.parameter: Minimum distance from WiFi interfering devices

source_refs.section_title: WiFi Operational Reliability and System Requirements
source_refs.source_quote: Maintain a distance of at least 6 ft. (2 m) from these devices: Computers, Audio and video systems, Devices with active WiFi connection, Electronic transformers, Pre-ballasts
B Temperature and pressure gauge NPT 1/2 in.
D Pressure relief valve NPT 11/4 in.
F low water cutoff NPT 1/2 in.
G Boiler temperature sensor BSP 1/8 in.
Max. allowable working pressure (MAWP): .... 80 psi (5.5 bar)
Max. allowable working pressure (MAWP): .... 80 psi (5.5 bar)
① Boiler return: 2 in. NPT for CI2 399/500
② Boiler supply: 2 in. NPT for CI2 399/500
L Gas gas shut-off valve, 11/2 in. for models 399, 500, 750 and 1000

technical_specs.parameter: Gas pipe connection size for 500 MBH burner
Gas pipe connection size for 1000 MBH burner

source_refs.source_quote: 2* 11/2 in. for Vitocrossal 200, CI2 models 399 to 1000
2 in. for Vitocrossal 200, CI2 models 1500 and 2000
Gas connection: Vitocrossal 200, CI2: 11/2 in. NPT for models 399, 500, 750 and 1000
Install high pressure regulator a minimum of 10 ft. (3.3 m) upstream of the boiler fuel connection.
Install one gas pressure regulator per boiler.
Requires 2 wire cable with a minimum wire size of 24 AWG
PlusBus system length max. 164 ft. (50m) for 26 AWG (0.34 mm2) shielded cable.
PlusBus system length max. 164 ft. (50m) for 26 AWG (0.34 mm2) shielded cable.

technical_specs.parameter: Mixing valve extension kit (with EM-M1) internal fuse protection

source_refs.source_quote: Mixing valve extension kit (with EM-M1) 2 A

technical_specs.parameter: Pump Connection (DIN rail) rated current Max.
Pump connection WP/MZIO 120V~ (contactor specification rated voltage)
Pump connection WP/MZIO 120V~ (contactor specification rated current)
Pump connection WP/MZIO 240V~ (contactor specification rated voltage)
Pump connection WP/MZIO 240V~ (contactor specification rated current)
Pump connection WP/MZIO 208/460/575V~ (contactor specification rated voltage)
Pump connection WP/MZIO 208/460/575V~ (contactor specification rated current)

source_refs.source_quote: Connection (external): Ø 3/4 in. (Ø 19 mm) barb fitting.
Discharge tubing (field supplied) must be 1 in. diameter.

technical_specs.parameter: Neutralization unit inlet/outlet height from base (CI2 1500 and 2000)

source_refs.section_title: Connections on the Flue Gas Side
source_refs.source_quote: The inlet and outlet of the neutralization unit must be less than 6in. (160 mm) from the base of the neutralization system to the bottom of the inlet/outlet to ensure proper condensate drainage (refer to dimension A).
The boiler should be filled and properly bled of air and the cold water fill pressure should not exceed 18-20 psig.
A 40% antifreeze content will provide freeze-up protection to -10°F (-23°C).

source_refs.section_title: Connections on the Flue Gas Side

source_refs.source_quote: Connect flue system. Size: 4 in. (104.2 mm) for models 399 and 500

source_refs.section_title: Connections on the Flue Gas Side

technical_specs.parameter: PP(s) vent system maximum temperature rating

source_refs.section_title: Requirement for Rigid SS/PP(s)/CPVC Vent Pipe Material
source_refs.source_quote: This PP(s) vent system is constructed from flame-retardant plastic [polypropylene rated for a maximum temperature of 230°F (110°C)].

technical_specs.parameter: Flexible venting system equivalent length reduction

source_refs.section_title: Requirement for Rigid SS/PP(s)/CPVC Vent Pipe Material
source_refs.source_quote: If a certified flexible venting system supplied by one of the venting manufacturers listed on page 52 or flexible combustion air-intake pipe are used, the total maximum equivalent length will be reduced by 25%.

Minimum height of intake/exhaust terminals above grade/snow (sidewall)
Minimum height of air intake from ground (sidewall)
Elbow equivalent length (6 in. / 150 mm, 8 in. / 200 mm, 45°)
Elbow equivalent length (6 in. / 150 mm, 8 in. / 200 mm, 90°)
Vertical vent termination height above roof/obstruction

source_refs.source_quote: A vent used in a special venting system with positive vent pressure and passing through a roof shall extend at least 18 in. (450 mm) above the highest point where it passes through the roof and any other obstruction within a horizontal distance of 18 in. (450 mm).

technical_specs.parameter: Minimum distance for horizontal vent terminations (multiple boilers)

source_refs.source_quote: Note: 12 in. (305 mm) minimum distance apart for horizontal vent terminations.

technical_specs.parameter: Minimum distance for vertical vent terminations (multiple boilers)

source_refs.source_quote: Note: 4 in. (100 mm) minimum distance apart for vertical vent terminations.

technical_specs.parameter: Minimum height for vertical vent termination (multiple boilers)

safety_warnings.text: Read and save these instructions for future reference.

source_refs.source_quote: IMPORTANT Read and save these instructions for future reference.

safety_warnings.text: Installers must follow local regulations with respect to installation of carbon monoxide detectors. Follow the Viessmann maintenance schedule of the boiler contained in this manual.

source_refs.source_quote: WARNING Installers must follow local regulations with respect to installation of carbon monoxide detectors. Follow the Viessmann maintenance schedule of the boiler contained in this manual.

safety_warnings.text: Please ensure that these instructions are read and understood before commencing installation. Failure to comply with the instructions listed below and details printed in this manual can cause product/property damage, severe personal injury, and/or loss of life. Ensure all requirements below are understood and fulfilled (including detailed information found in manual subsections).

source_refs.source_quote: Please ensure that these instructions are read and understood before commencing installation. Failure to comply with the instructions listed below and details printed in this manual can cause product/property damage, severe personal injury, and/or loss of life. Ensure all requirements below are understood and fulfilled (including detailed information found in manual subsections).

safety_warnings.text: Read all applicable documentation before commencing installation. Store documentation near boiler in a readily accessible location for reference in the future by service personnel.

source_refs.source_quote: ■ Product documentation Read all applicable documentation before commencing installation. Store documentation near boiler in a readily accessible location for reference in the future by service personnel.

safety_warnings.text: Information contained in this and related product documentation must be read and followed. Failure to do so renders the warranty null and void.

source_refs.source_quote: ■ Warranty Information contained in this and related product documentation must be read and followed. Failure to do so renders the warranty null and void.

safety_warnings.text: The installation, adjustment, service and maintenance of this equipment must be performed by a licensed professional heating contractor.

source_refs.source_quote: Licensed professional heating contractor The installation, adjustment, service and maintenance of this equipment must be performed by a licensed professional heating contractor.

safety_warnings.text: Improper installation, adjustment, service and/or maintenance can cause flue products to flow into living space. Flue products contain poisonous carbon monoxide gas.

source_refs.source_quote: Carbon monoxide Improper installation, adjustment, service and/or maintenance can cause flue products to flow into living space. Flue products contain poisonous carbon monoxide gas.

safety_warnings.text: This equipment requires fresh air for safe operation and must be installed ensuring provisions for adequate combustion and ventilation air exist.

source_refs.source_quote: Fresh air This equipment requires fresh air for safe operation and must be installed ensuring provisions for adequate combustion and ventilation air exist.

safety_warnings.text: Air contaminated by chemicals can cause by-products in the combustion process, which are poisonous to inhabitants and destructive to Viessmann equipment.

source_refs.source_quote: ■ Contaminated air Air contaminated by chemicals can cause by-products in the combustion process, which are poisonous to inhabitants and destructive to Viessmann equipment.

safety_warnings.text: Never operate boiler without an installed venting system. An improper venting system can cause carbon monoxide poisoning.

source_refs.source_quote: Equipment venting Never operate boiler without an installed venting system. An improper venting system can cause carbon monoxide poisoning.

safety_warnings.topic: Fiberglass Wool and Ceramic Fiber Materials
safety_warnings.text: Inhaling of fiberglass wool and/or ceramic fiber materials is a possible cancer hazard. These materials can also cause respiratory, skin and eye irritation.

source_refs.section_title: Fiberglass wool and ceramic fiber materials
source_refs.source_quote: WARNING Inhaling of fiberglass wool and/or ceramic fiber materials is a possible cancer hazard. These materials can also cause respiratory, skin and eye irritation.

safety_warnings.text: Appliance materials of construction, products of combustion and the fuel contain alumina, silica, heavy metals, carbon monoxide, nitrogen oxides, aldehydes and/or other toxic or harmful substances which can cause serious injury or loss of life and which are known to the State of California to cause cancer, birth defects and other reproductive harm. Always use proper safety clothing, respirators and equipment when servicing or working nearby the appliance.

source_refs.source_quote: WARNING Appliance materials of construction, products of combustion and the fuel contain alumina, silica, heavy metals, carbon monoxide, nitrogen oxides, aldehydes and/or other toxic or harmful substances which can cause serious injury or loss of life and which are known to the State of California to cause cancer, birth defects and other reproductive harm. Always use proper safety clothing, respirators and equipment when servicing or working nearby the appliance.

safety_warnings.text: Failure to ensure that all flue gases have been safely vented to the outdoors can cause property damage, severe personal injury, or loss of life. Flue gases may contain deadly carbon monoxide.

source_refs.source_quote: WARNING Failure to ensure that all flue gases have been safely vented to the outdoors can cause property damage, severe personal injury, or loss of life. Flue gases may contain deadly carbon monoxide.

safety_warnings.text: Under certain climatic conditions some building materials may be affected by flue products expelled in close proximity to unprotected surfaces. Sealing or shielding of the exposed surfaces with a corrosion resistant material (e.g. aluminum sheeting) may be required to prevent staining or deterioration. The protective material should be attached and sealed (if necessary) to the building before attaching the vent termination. It is strongly recommended to install the vent termination on the leeward side of the building.

source_refs.source_quote: CAUTION Under certain climatic conditions some building materials may be affected by flue products expelled in close proximity to unprotected surfaces. Sealing or shielding of the exposed surfaces with a corrosion resistant material (e.g. aluminum sheeting) may be required to prevent staining or deterioration. The protective material should be attached and sealed (if necessary) to the building before attaching the vent termination. It is strongly recommended to install the vent termination on the leeward side of the building.

safety_warnings.text: This product comes with several safety instruction labels attached. Do not remove! Contact Viessmann immediately if replacement labels are required.

source_refs.source_quote: This product comes with several safety instruction labels attached. Do not remove! Contact Viessmann immediately if replacement labels are required.

safety_warnings.text: The installer must verify that at least one carbon monoxide alarm has been installed within a residential living space or home following the alarm manufacturer's instructions and applicable codes before putting the appliance into operation.

source_refs.source_quote: The installer must verify that at least one carbon monoxide alarm has been installed within a residential living space or home following the alarm manufacturer's instructions and applicable codes before putting the appliance into operation.

safety_warnings.text: Indicates an imminently hazardous situation which, if not avoided, could result in death, serious injury or substantial product/property damage.

source_refs.source_quote: WARNING Indicates an imminently hazardous situation which, if not avoided, could result in death, serious injury or substantial product/property damage.

safety_warnings.text: Indicates an imminently hazardous situation which, if not avoided, may result in minor injury or product/property damage.

source_refs.source_quote: CAUTION Indicates an imminently hazardous situation which, if not avoided, may result in minor injury or product/ property damage.

safety_warnings.text: Helpful hints for installation, operation or maintenance which pertain to the product.

source_refs.source_quote: IMPORTANT Helpful hints for installation, operation or maintenance which pertain to the product.

safety_warnings.text: Failure to flush out the heating system piping may result in restricted flow and/or deposits resulting in boiler failure. This failure is not covered under warranty. Installation of magnetic filtration is recommended.

source_refs.source_quote: Failure to flush out the heating system piping may result in restricted flow and/or deposits resulting in boiler failure. This failure is not covered under warranty. Installation of magnetic filtration is recommended.

safety_warnings.text: Avoid air contamination by halogenated hydrocarbons (e.g. as in sprays, paints, solvents and cleaning agents)

source_refs.source_quote: Avoid air contamination by halogenated hydrocarbons (e.g. as in sprays, paints, solvents and cleaning agents)

safety_warnings.text: Avoid very dusty conditions
Avoid high levels of humidity
Protect against frost and ensure good ventilation, otherwise the system may suffer faults and damage.

source_refs.source_quote: Protect against frost and ensure good ventilation, otherwise the system may suffer faults and damage.

safety_warnings.text: In rooms where air contamination from halogenated hydrocarbons is to be expected, operate the boiler using only direct vent (sealed combustion) operation only.

source_refs.source_quote: In rooms where air contamination from halogenated hydrocarbons is to be expected, operate the boiler using only direct vent (sealed combustion) operation only.

safety_warnings.text: Do not push on the jacketing to remove the boiler from the skid.

source_refs.source_quote: CAUTION Do not push on the jacketing to remove the boiler from the skid.

safety_warnings.text: The boiler can cause serious injury if it overturns. At least 2 people are required to move the boiler. Roll the boiler in a straight line.

source_refs.source_quote: WARNING The boiler can cause serious injury if it overturns. At least 2 people are required to move the boiler. Roll the boiler in a straight line.

safety_warnings.text: Changes or modifications not expressly approved by the party responsible for compliance could void the user's authority to operate the equipment.

source_refs.section_title: WiFi Operational Reliability and System Requirements
source_refs.source_quote: CAUTION Changes or modifications not expressly approved by the party responsible for compliance could void the user's authority to operate the equipment.

safety_warnings.text: Unsuitable water quality can damage the boiler. Only fill the boiler with water that complies with the water quality requirements.

source_refs.source_quote: IMPORTANT Unsuitable water quality can damage the boiler. Only fill the boiler with water that complies with the water quality requirements.

safety_warnings.text: The Vitocrossal 200, C12 boiler is only suited for hot water heating. Do not install a 4-way mixing valve.

source_refs.source_quote: IMPORTANT The Vitocrossal 200, C12 boiler is only suited for hot water heating. Do not install a 4-way mixing valve.

safety_warnings.text: Do not connect heating system to safety header.

source_refs.source_quote: CAUTION Do not connect heating system to safety header.

safety_warnings.text: Exposing the boiler to pressures and temperatures in excess of those listed will result in damages, and will render warranty null and void.

source_refs.source_quote: WARNING Exposing the boiler to pressures and temperatures in excess of those listed will result in damages, and will render warranty null and void.

safety_warnings.text: If test pressure is too high burner and gas fittings may get damaged.

source_refs.source_quote: WARNING If test pressure is too high burner and gas fittings may get damaged.

safety_warnings.text: Escaped gas may lead to explosion, which could cause severe injuries. Do not vent gas pipe above combustion chamber of boiler.

source_refs.source_quote: WARNING Escaped gas may lead to explosion, which could cause severe injuries. Do not vent gas pipe above combustion chamber of boiler.

safety_warnings.text: If gas pipe contains dirt it is recommended to install a gas filter into the gas pipe.

source_refs.source_quote: CAUTION If gas pipe contains dirt it is recommended to install a gas filter into the gas pipe.

safety_warnings.text: Escaped gas may lead to an explosion, which could cause severe injuries or property damage.

source_refs.source_quote: WARNING Escaped gas may lead to an explosion, which could cause severe injuries or property damage.

safety_warnings.text: This test should only be performed by a trained licensed heating contractor.

source_refs.source_quote: IMPORTANT This test should only be performed by a trained licensed heating contractor.

safety_warnings.text: Failure to keep a firm grip on the panel handle may cause the upper front panel to fall causing injury.

source_refs.source_quote: CAUTION Failure to keep a firm grip on the panel handle may cause the upper front panel to fall causing injury.

safety_warnings.text: Melting insulation can lead to equipment damage. Electronic wires must not come into contact with each other or hot components.

source_refs.source_quote: CAUTION Melting insulation can lead to equipment damage. Electronic wires must not come into contact with each other or hot components.

safety_warnings.text: Incorrect connection will lead to malfunctions. Ensure correct polarity.

source_refs.source_quote: IMPORTANT Incorrect connection will lead to malfunctions. Ensure correct polarity.

safety_warnings.text: Incorrect wiring can lead to serious injury from electrical current and result in appliance damage.

source_refs.source_quote: WARNING Incorrect wiring can lead to serious injury from electrical current and result in appliance damage.

safety_warnings.text: Never route this cable next to line voltage (120VAC or greater).

source_refs.source_quote: Never route this cable next to line voltage (120VAC or greater).

safety_warnings.text: The control must be grounded. Ensure that 'L', 'N' and 'G' are not interchanged.

source_refs.source_quote: WARNING The control must be grounded. Ensure that 'L', 'N' and 'G' are not interchanged.

safety_warnings.text: Incorrectly executed electrical installations can lead to injuries from electrical current and result in appliance damage.

source_refs.source_quote: WARNING Incorrectly executed electrical installations can lead to injuries from electrical current and result in appliance damage.

safety_warnings.text: Electrical installations must comply with the latest edition of: In the U.S.A., the National Electrical Code (NEC), ANSI/NFPA 70 and any other state, local codes and/or regulations. In Canada, the Canadian Electrical Code (CEC), CSA C22.1 Part 1 and any other province, territory, local codes and/or regulations.

source_refs.source_quote: IMPORTANT Electrical installations must comply with the latest edition of: In the U.S.A., the National Electrical Code (NEC), ANSI/NFPA 70 and any other state, local codes and/or regulations. ■In Canada, the Canadian Electrical Code (CEC), CSA C22.1 Part 1 and any other province, territory, local codes and/or regulations.

safety_warnings.text: Escaping flue gas can cause life threatening poisoning from carbon monoxide. To prevent flue gas escaping, only operate the boiler with a condensate trap.

source_refs.section_title: Connections on the Flue Gas Side
source_refs.source_quote: WARNING Escaping flue gas can cause life threatening poisoning from carbon monoxide. To prevent flue gas escaping, only operate the boiler with a condensate trap.

safety_warnings.text: Do not connect the drain pipe from any other appliance, such as a water softener backwash pipe, to the Vitocrossal 200, C12 condensate drain pipe.

source_refs.source_quote: IMPORTANT Do not connect the drain pipe from any other appliance, such as a water softener backwash pipe, to the Vitocrossal 200, C12 condensate drain pipe.

safety_warnings.text: Pipe ventilation must take place between the siphon trap and the neutralization unit (if applicable).

source_refs.source_quote: IMPORTANT Pipe ventilation must take place between the siphon trap and the neutralization unit (if applicable).

safety_warnings.text: Always connect the drain with a P-trap or siphon to prevent flue gas from escaping into the space.

source_refs.source_quote: IMPORTANT Always connect the drain with a P-trap or siphon to prevent flue gas from escaping into the space.

safety_warnings.text: Fill only suitable water in boiler. Unsuitable water quality may damage boiler.

source_refs.source_quote: WARNING Fill only suitable water in boiler. Unsuitable water quality may damage boiler.

safety_warnings.text: Only use antifreeze specific for hydronic heating systems. Do not use automotive glycol!

source_refs.source_quote: IMPORTANT Only use antifreeze specific for hydronic heating systems. Do not use automotive glycol!

safety_warnings.text: Before the heating boiler is installed and piped into an existing system, the heating system itself must be properly flushed to remove dirt and system sludge. Accumulations in old heating systems will tend to settle in the boiler and can lead to deposits which can cause hot spots, noise and water-side corrosion. For damages resulting from those kinds of impurities, the warranty will be null and void.

source_refs.source_quote: CAUTION Before the heating boiler is installed and piped into an existing system, the heating system itself must be properly flushed to remove dirt and system sludge. Accumulations in old heating systems will tend to settle in the boiler and can lead to deposits which can cause hot spots, noise and water-side corrosion. For damages resulting from those kinds of impurities, the warranty will be null and void.

safety_warnings.text: Secure the discharge piping from the pressure relief valve with the appropriate hangers or brackets.

source_refs.source_quote: IMPORTANT Secure the discharge piping from the pressure relief valve with the appropriate hangers or brackets.

safety_warnings.text: Cold water fill pressure must equal expansion tank pressure.

source_refs.source_quote: IMPORTANT Cold water fill pressure must equal expansion tank pressure.

safety_warnings.text: Ensure that there is no leak on any of the connections which are covered by the insulation.

source_refs.source_quote: IMPORTANT Ensure that there is no leak on any of the connections which are covered by the insulation.

safety_warnings.text: For underfloor heating applications, an additional immersion or strap-on aquastat must be installed in the low temperature underfloor loop (downstream of the mixing valve) to de-energize the pump and/or boiler to prevent overheating. High water temperatures can damage concrete slabs.

source_refs.source_quote: CAUTION For underfloor heating applications, an additional immersion or strap-on aquastat must be installed in the low temperature underfloor loop (downstream of the mixing valve) to de-energize the pump and/or boiler to prevent overheating. High water temperatures can damage concrete slabs.

safety_warnings.text: If a DHW storage tank other than a Viessmann Vitocell 300 tank is used, the installer must verify proper operation of the Viessmann DHW tank temperature sensor with the original manufacturer of the tank. Viessmann strongly recommends the installation of a temperature tempering valve in the DHW supply line.

extraction_notes: Original Gemini response was malformed JSON and was repaired by the pipeline.
overall_confidence was missing or invalid and was set to 0.0 by the pipeline.
